alerts.educational_note: The dd utility is powerful and legitimate, but unexpected dd execution may indicate file manipulation, disk copying, or defense evasion activity.
alerts.recommended_action: Review the command arguments and determine whether this use of dd was expected for the user or system.

alerts.educational_note: The dd utility can copy or modify binary data. Attackers may use it to pad or alter files, which can change hashes and help evade simple file-based detection.
alerts.recommended_action: Inspect the files referenced by the dd command and compare them against known-good versions or expected hashes.
